data.title: UNI forecast: Expect $6.29 by Feb 2026. Now at $5.71, resistance at $6.05 & support at $5.29 for Uniswap. Tech analysis suggests potential upside.
data.description: The predicted price for UNI indicates a neutral trend at $5.71, but there is a possibility of it rising to $6.29. Based on technical analysis, the key resistance level stands at $6.05, while critical support is identified at $5.29. This forecast suggests that UNI may experience fluctuations within this range in the near future.

data.title: Prediction: LINK could hit $15.50-$16.50 by Feb 2026, with potential 18% rally from $13.94 in 4-6 weeks as KOLs back bullish momentum.

These predictions are generating excitement within the cryptocurrency community.

data.title: Unity (NYSE: U) to release Q4 and FY 2025 financial results on Feb 11, 2026, followed by webcast at 8:30 a.m. ET/5:30 a.m. PT.
data.description: San Francisco-based company, Unity (NYSE: U), shared plans to disclose its financial results for the fourth quarter and fiscal year 2025 on February 11, 2026. The announcement stated that the release will take place before the market opens, followed by a webcast at 8:30 a.m. ET/5:30 a.m. PT. Interested individuals can access the webcast and financial information on investors.unity.com. For those unable to participate in real-time, a replay of the webcast will be accessible on Unity's Investor Relations website. Unity Software Inc. provides a suite of tools for development, deployment, and growth.

data.title: Wells Fargo posts Q4 2025 net income of $5.4B, beats consensus with $1.76 EPS, revenue at $21.3B, ROE at 12.3%. CEO confident about level playing field in 2026.
data.description: Wells Fargo reported fourth-quarter 2025 net income of $5.4 billion, or $1.62 per diluted share, up from $5.1 billion, or $1.43 per share, a year earlier. Excluding $612 million in severance expenses, adjusted net income rose to $5.8 billion. The bank beat expectations with adjusted earnings of $1.76, above the consensus of $1.67. Revenue increased 4% to $21.3 billion, missing analyst expectations of $21.65 billion. Return on equity improved to 12.3% from 11.7%, while return on tangible common equity rose to 14.5% from 13.9%. Net interest income rose 4% to $12.3 billion, driven by higher loan balances, while noninterest income increased 5% to $9.0 billion. Consumer Banking and Lending saw a strong performance, with total revenue up 7%, and Consumer, Small, and Business Banking revenue increasing by 9%. Credit card and auto lending revenue also rose by 7%, while home lending revenue declined by 6%.

data.title: Uptown Cheapskate and Kid to Kid reach $300M in sales, announce record-breaking growth in 2025, nationwide expansion.
data.description: BaseCamp Franchising, the parent company of popular thrift stores Uptown Cheapskate and Kid to Kid, has achieved over $300 million in sales and is expanding their presence across the country due to the increasing consumer interest in thrift shopping. The company disclosed this information on January 14, 2026, in Salt Lake City.

data.title: Shoot 360 achieved record growth in 2025, with 13 new locations and expansion into 8 key markets.
data.description: A basketball training franchise utilizing technology, Shoot 360, has recently opened 13 new locations in 2025. This expansion has allowed the franchise to venture into eight key markets. The company's headquarters in Vancouver, Wash., made the announcement on January 14, 2026. The growth in the previous year has been significant for Shoot 360, showcasing its leadership in tech-driven basketball training.

data.title: Chuck Mooty, former Dairy Queen CEO, joins Presto as strategic advisor. Presto is a leader in Voice AI technology for QSRs.
data.description: In San Mateo, California, Presto Phoenix, Inc. (Presto), a top player in enterprise-level Voice AI solutions for quick-service restaurants (QSRs), revealed that Chuck Mooty, former CEO of Dairy Queen, has joined the team as a strategic advisor. Mooty, known for his significant contributions in the industry, led Dairy Queen during a pivotal time, teaming up with Berkshire Hathaway to solidify Dairy Queen's renowned status in American culture. With Mooty at the helm as CEO and Chairman for 8 years, his expertise is expected to bring valuable insights to Presto.

data.title: Reflex Sales Group and Alternative Retail form alliance to unlock excess inventory ecosystem for global brands. (Words: 18)
data.description: In Calabasas, California on January 14, 2026, Reflex Sales Group, a prominent player in excess inventory solutions, and Alternative Retail, the leading operator of branded warehouse sales, have joined forces in a strategic partnership. This collaboration aims to leverage their expertise and networks, with Reflex Sales Group's global influence and Alternative Retail's reputation in branded warehouse sales. The websites for each company - www.reflexsalesgroup.com and www.alternativeretail.com - serve as platforms for this announcement.

data.title: Trilogy Innovations awarded portion of $151B Missile Defense Agency contract for SHIELD program.
data.description: Washington, D.C., January 14, 2026 - Trilogy Innovations, Inc. has secured a contract for the Missile Defense Agency's Scalable Homeland Innovative Layered Defense (SHIELD) program. The indefinite-delivery/indefinite-quantity (IDIQ) contract boasts a substantial ceiling of $151 billion. The impressive award highlights Trilogy Innovations, Inc.'s growing presence in the defense sector and underscores its commitment to cutting-edge technological solutions for national security.

data.title: Chicago-based PR firm Bear Icebox Communications joins global network IPREX, signaling growth in 2026.
data.description: A renowned global communications network has fortified its reach by incorporating a new partner agency situated in Chicago. This development, as of January 14, 2026, emphasizes the network's vigor and growth potential for the year. Bear Icebox Communications, a distinguished full-service strategic PR and communications entity in Chicago, stands as the latest addition to this expanding network, showcasing a promising outlook for 2026.

data.title: Viridi sells first ITCs from Magnolia Landfill RNG project in Alabama, accelerating investment in renewable energy infrastructure.
data.description: In New York, Viridi Energy, a key player in the renewable natural gas sector and a part of Warburg Pincus investment portfolio, disclosed the completion of its initial sale of Investment Tax Credits (ITCs) under Section 48. This transaction pertains to Viridi’s project converting landfill gas to RNG at Magnolia Landfill in Baldwin County, Alabama. By effectively leveraging Section 48 tax credits, Viridi demonstrates its capacity to convert them to financial gains, facilitating faster investment in local renewable energy infrastructure. This move showcases Viridi's commitment to sustainable practices and its adeptness in navigating the financial landscape for the benefit of domestic renewable energy initiatives.

data.description: In New York, the prominent veterinary pharmacy Mixlab revealed that they will soon introduce Maisy, an AI health partner crafted to aid veterinarians and pet owners during the medication process. This reveal comes after a period of substantial expansion for Mixlab, as they persist in expanding their technology-centric methods in veterinary pharmacy. By 2025, Mixlab had collaborated with over 30,000 prescribers, marking a growth rate of over 100% annually, and facilitated the treatment...

data.title: SpotOn partners with Guy's Flavortown Tailgate, helping independent restaurants boost sales with practical operations.
data.description: SpotOn, a prominent software partner for restaurants, has revealed its mission to enhance independent restaurants by providing them with the tools and support needed to capitalize on cultural trends to drive sales and customer loyalty. The announcement was made in San Francisco on January 14, 2026. With a focus on practical, profit-driven operations, SpotOn aims to help restaurants translate cultural events into tangible financial outcomes. This initiative is backed by the company's extensive resources and expertise tailored specifically for the restaurant industry.

data.title: BoomRx introduces oral semaglutide and tirzepatide for healthcare providers nationwide, aiming to enhance absorption and support weight management. Tampa, Fla., Jan. 14, 2026. (Characters: 142)
data.description: A novel nanoemulsion delivery system has been developed in Tampa, Florida to improve absorption and ensure more consistent effectiveness in weight management. This innovation by BoomRx, a rapidly expanding pharmaceutical technology platform, aims to enhance performance without the need for injections. The breakthrough was announced on January 14, 2026, marking a significant advancement in the field. This development could potentially revolutionize weight management strategies, offering a more efficient and reliable solution.

data.title: Yachtwear.com and Smallwood's Yachtwear collaborate to create the first online coastal apparel marketplace.
data.description: A partnership has been formed between Yachtwear.com and Smallwood's Yachtwear, a well-known supplier of maritime uniforms. This collaboration aims to introduce the world's initial specialized online platform for high-end coastal and yachting clothing. The marketplace will offer a carefully selected range of products for this niche market. The collaboration was officially announced on January 14, 2026, in Fort Lauderdale, Florida.

data.title: Voltaire, an AI company, wins multiple awards for innovation in the US. Recognized by top editors. NEW YORK, Jan. 14, 2026.
data.description: Voltaire, a cutting-edge platform utilizing artificial intelligence for claims correspondence in the property and casualty insurance sector, has recently been awarded top honors by a panel of editors and reporters from prominent publications in North America. This recognition comes as Voltaire emerges as a standout leader in its field, revolutionizing the claims process with advanced technology. The award was conferred on January 14, 2026, in New York, solidifying Voltaire's position as a market innovator in AI-powered solutions for insurance.

data.title: Survey finds 61% are not ready for agentic AI despite rising adoption rates in U.S. companies.
data.description: In Singapore on January 14, 2026, a study conducted by Parseur revealed that American companies are rapidly implementing agentic AI technology. The survey, which involved 500 U.S. business leaders and managers overseeing document-based operations, indicated that 69% of them believe they are progressing quicker than their available data resources can adequately support.
